ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season in which the match was played */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the match was played */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the match was played */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team playing the match */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team playing the match */,
  "toss_winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the toss */,
  "toss_decision" TEXT /* Decision made by the toss winner (e.g., bat, field) */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., T20, ODI, Test) */,
  "result_margin" INTEGER /* Margin of victory (e.g., runs, wickets) */,
  "result_method" TEXT /* Method of result (e.g., normal, DLS) */,
  "player_of_the_match" INTEGER /* ID of the player of the match */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., completed, abandoned, no result) */,
  "umpire1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first umpire */,
  "umpire2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second umpire */,
  "reserve_umpire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reserve umpire */,
  "match_referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match referee */,
  "match_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the match (e.g., 3 hours, 50 minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_toss_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("toss_winner_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league in which the season is played */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the season */,
  "number_of_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches in the season */,
  "season_format" TEXT /* Format of the season (e.g., round-robin, knockout) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team coach */,
  "founded_year" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "home_city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the team is based */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Number of players in the team */,
  "number_of_staff" INTEGER /* Number of staff members (e.g., coaches, physiotherapists) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_home_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the coach is from */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "previous_teams" TEXT /* Previous teams coached */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the coach's image */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles (e.g., LinkedIn, Twitter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "founded_year" TEXT /* Year the league was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the league's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the league's official website */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "number_of_seasons" INTEGER /* Number of seasons in the league */,
  "number_of_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, viewer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive, banned) */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the match data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the match data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
